usage: move_obj [-help] [-group] { -point {x y} | { -direction {up down left right} { -distance <float> | -to {core_box die_box} }}} { <obj_list> | -selected  }

options.name: <obj_list>
options.description: specify list of objects to move. ((any_object)+, optional)

options.name: -direction
options.description: specify direction which objects will be moved.

options.name: -distance
options.description: specify distance which objects will be moved to specified direction.

options.name: -group
options.description: move all specify objects or selected objects as a group.

options.name: -point
options.description: specify low left point which objects will be moved to.

options.name: -to
options.description: specify move object to core box or die box boundary.
